description: Structured catalog. v0.4+: Phase 0 seeds + harness + Multica (Entry 012) triple-write.

optional_tracking.pinned_commit: Exact SHA or tag for reproducibility in pipelines (default approach for most tools)
optional_tracking.subtree_path: Relative path if added via git subtree (rare, see SUBTREES.md)
optional_tracking.submodule: true/false or path if added as git submodule
optional_tracking.bootstrap_path: Path under this repo for first-party installable integration packages
optional_tracking.source_aggregate: Slug or name of aggregate/list repo this tool was synthesized from (see sources/aggregates.md)
optional_tracking.x_post_id: Status ID if directly from an X post seed

schema_notes.aggregates_array: Top-level array for logged aggregates (parallel to tools array).

tools.name: Grok CLI bootstrap
tools.notes: First-party replayable install: skills (adr/docs/open-questions/karpathy-guidelines), ponytail skills.paths, codebase-memory MCP config, memory enabled. Run ./bootstrap/grok-cli/install.sh

tools.name: project-process bootstrap
tools.notes: Scaffold DESIGN/ADR/TODO/OQ/AGENTS for new projects. Skills: project-process + adr/docs/open-questions. Verdict: light framework sufficient vs adr-tools/SaaS.

tools.name: agent-cage (PNNL)
tools.notes: PRIMARY integration harness. Docker sandbox with MCP overlay, policy engine, versionable images. agentcage CLI + compose. First tool for containerized testing of catalog integrations. See harness/agent-cage/.

tools.name: adr-tools
tools.notes: Optional CLI companion for ADR numbering. Not a replacement for project-process skills/scaffold.

tools.name: codebase-memory-mcp
tools.notes: Grok MCP code-graph server. Install binary via official install.sh --skip-config; config owned by bootstrap/grok-cli. In-cage smoke: make smoke-codebase-memory (index+search fixture).

tools.name: LiteLLM
tools.notes: Critical unification layer for Grok CLI + local hybrid pipelines. Default approach: pinned commit + shallow clone in pipelines.

tools.name: Ollama
tools.notes: Default local backend. Grok CLI entrypoint via base_url. No subtree (large history). Use pinned + shallow clone.

tools.name: colibri
tools.notes: Extreme low-resource inference engine for GLM-5.2 744B MoE (~40B active params). Pure C, zero dependencies, streams experts from disk while keeping dense part (~17B params, ~9.9GB int4) resident in RAM. Enables flagship-scale local inference on ~25GB laptop / no GPU. CLI chat + OpenAI-compatible serve mode. Tradeoff: low tokens/s (0.05-1+ tok/s on consumer NVMe). High novelty, rapid adoption signal (2k+ stars quickly). Strong fit for local agent pipelines needing massive reasoning/context on constrained hardware. Integrates via serve endpoint + LiteLLM. See sources/x-posts.md for X seed analysis and community speed notes. Pinned recent main (Tauri desktop addition).

tools.name: Continue.dev
tools.notes: Best IDE surface. High MCP/repo context synergy. Default pinned-SHA approach.

tools.name: ponytail
tools.notes: Skills-only snapshot registered via Grok skills.paths. Full repo not embedded.

tools.name: karpathy-guidelines
tools.notes: MIT single skill vendored into bootstrap first-party skills install.

tools.name: repowise
tools.notes: Context optimization layer with published efficiency benchmarks. Complement to codebase-memory-mcp. In-cage smoke: make smoke-repowise (repowise==0.30.0, health zero-LLM). See pipelines/smoke/context-tools-compare.md.

tools.name: gstack
tools.notes: 23 specialist skills + power tools. Patterns portable to Grok; do not full-embed large tree. Use for role-router recipes + selective skill ports.

tools.name: mattpocock/skills
tools.notes: Composable engineering skills. Vendor selected skills via skills.paths snapshot like ponytail.

tools.name: marketing-skills (marketing-council)
tools.notes: 47-skill pack; flagship marketing-council + dissenter. Port SKILL.md patterns into bootstrap/grok-cli skills; do not embed full pack unless customized.

tools.name: Antigravity-Manager
tools.notes: Local API relay + multi-account switcher. Complements LiteLLM. Eval Tauri binary optionally; pin on adoption.

tools.name: Jamon Holmgren agentic setup
tools.notes: Workflow checklist not a single repo. Partially absorbed into AGENTS.md advanced section. Continue synthesizing into project-process templates.

tools.name: Ruben Hassid context/token hacks
tools.notes: Practice list not a repo. Principles → AGENTS.md / context-budget skill. Complements repowise.

tools.name: Multica
tools.notes: Managed agents platform (board, issue assignment, human+AI timeline, Skills). X Entry 012. Complements gstack; Docker self-host. Evaluate daemon vs Grok CLI separately; not a replacement for agent-cage isolation.

x_posts.author: @chenzeling4 (Zane Chen)
x_posts.summary: Colibri: pure C, zero-dep inference engine running GLM-5.2 744B MoE (~40B active) on ~25GB RAM laptop by streaming experts from disk. Single ~2400-line C core. CLI + OpenAI serve mode. High engagement (3k+ likes, 3.5k bookmarks).
Docker sandbox harness with MCP; primary container test framework
